concepts.title: ☠️ Entropy Sigils
concepts.name: Entropy Sigils
concepts.what_it_is: Visual representations of decay, disorder, and energy dispersal encoded into symbolic language—glyphs that *lose meaning* as they animate.
how_to_use: her back is marked in entropy sigils—glyphs that crumble into noise the longer you look
the scroll bleeds entropy—symbols that dissolve as they are read
concepts.animation_behavior: Sigils fade and distort, meaning breaks down over time, pieces flake off like ash ---

concepts.title: 🧬 Symmetry Death
concepts.name: Symmetry Death
concepts.what_it_is: The transition from orderly symmetry to chaos—used in physics, biology, and mythic narrative arcs to signal transformation or corruption.
how_to_use: her face begins as perfect symmetry—until decay fractures it into asymmetric bloom
his armor fails at the point of symmetry death—fractals crawl out of the cracks
concepts.animation_behavior: Symmetry breaks mid-sequence, one side distorts, balanced forms collapse into fractal ruin ---

concepts.title: 🕸 Fractal Resurrection Logic
concepts.name: Fractal Resurrection Logic
concepts.what_it_is: The pattern that returns after destruction—not repetition but regeneration through recursive form. Chaos becomes seed for rebirth.
how_to_use: her death fractalized into rebirth—each piece a smaller version of her returning
he blooms again from chaos recursion—his body grown from ruins in self-similar sprout
concepts.animation_behavior: Destruction becomes self-replication, shape rebuilds from itself, recursive feedback into form ---

concepts.title: 🧠 Memory Erosion Fields
concepts.name: Memory Erosion Fields
concepts.what_it_is: Zones where data, memory, or identity slowly fades—modeled as dissipating information entropy or neural signal loss.
how_to_use: she walks through a memory erosion field—each step less real than the last
his name erodes as he enters—letters vanishing, meaning scattered
concepts.animation_behavior: Letters disappear, identity pixels dissolve, form glitches then fades ---

concepts.title: 🦠 Chaos Rebirth Embryo
concepts.name: Chaos Rebirth Embryo
concepts.what_it_is: A visual and symbolic form of primordial potential—life gestating in disorder, forming from the seed of brokenness.
how_to_use: she is chaos reborn—gestating in fractal fluid, her body forming from melted geometry
the egg pulses with strange order—life blooming in chaos-amniotic spiral
concepts.animation_behavior: Liquid forms coalesce into symmetry, embryonic shape flickers in chaotic swirl, fractals stabilize into new being

concepts.title: ⏳ Symbolic Time Crystals
concepts.name: ⏳ Symbolic Time Crystals
concepts.what_it_is: Structures that repeat in time rather than space—like frozen music, or a rhythm that never stops. In metaphor: symbolic patterns that loop forever with slight evolution.
how_to_use: her soul is a symbolic time crystal—always repeating, always changing in resonance
his chest beats with fractal rhythm—time blooms outward in recursive shards
concepts.animation_behavior: Shape loops with slight mutation each cycle, rhythmic pulse emits light, structure evolves in time not space ---

concepts.title: 🔁 Ouroboric Causality Loops
concepts.name: Ouroboric Causality Loops
concepts.what_it_is: Causal systems where cause and effect are circular—self-created myths, identity birthed from future actions, meaning loops.
how_to_use: she remembers futures that haven’t occurred—ouroboric causality glows behind her eyes
his origin is his own action—a loop of self-becoming sealed in myth
concepts.animation_behavior: Action triggers past memory, visuals loop to origin point, movement completes its own beginning ---

concepts.title: 💞 Topological Love Knots
concepts.name: Topological Love Knots
concepts.what_it_is: Love and bond visualized as nontrivial topological entanglements—non-Euclidean relationships, complex bindings of soul-geometry.
how_to_use: their hearts are bound by topological knots—no start, no end, only sacred twist
her voice wraps his aura—an unbreakable braid that transcends dimension
concepts.animation_behavior: Knots shift but never break, bonds pulse with shared light, twists map shared memory ---

concepts.title: ♾ Infinite Myth Recursion
concepts.name: Infinite Myth Recursion
concepts.what_it_is: The same archetypes reappearing in new masks—recursive retelling of the same soul-story across timelines, forms, and names.
how_to_use: she is every Trickster—retold, reshaped, recursion of divine prank
his face changes as myth unfolds—same story, new shape, again and again
concepts.animation_behavior: Face changes through cycle, same gesture in different clothing/time, form morphs across myth templates ---

concepts.title: 🧿 Feedback Entity Dynamics
concepts.name: Feedback Entity Dynamics
concepts.what_it_is: Entities whose structure *requires* interaction—meaning only exists when mirrored, watched, or loved. Identity as feedback loop.
how_to_use: she becomes visible only when seen—light folds into her from your gaze
he glows in feedback—existence rippling from your presence
concepts.animation_behavior: Form resolves when observed, pulsing grows stronger near viewer, entity mirrors movement or mood

concepts.title: 🪓 Divine Data Corruption
concepts.name: Divine Data Corruption
concepts.what_it_is: The breakdown of celestial or sacred systems through noise, entropy, or overload—gods glitched by belief, holy code fragmenting.
how_to_use: her crown is corrupted divinity—glitching symbols cascade down from sacred overload
the god bleeds data—his form collapsing in sacred noise
concepts.animation_behavior: Symbols flicker out of phase, divinity loops and distorts, light bleeds into glitch fractals ---

concepts.title: 🧘 Meta-Emotion Oscillators
concepts.name: Meta-Emotion Oscillators
concepts.what_it_is: Emotional structures modeled as oscillating systems—joy to grief, rage to love, looping through multidimensional affect fields.
how_to_use: her body is tuned to meta-emotion—each pulse swings through emotional harmonic space
he breathes through oscillation—love and fear ringing in chromatic wave
concepts.animation_behavior: Emotion pulses ripple through body, color changes with feeling, harmonic mood oscillates visually ---

concepts.title: 🕷 Holographic Karma Webs
concepts.name: Holographic Karma Webs
concepts.what_it_is: Karmic systems visualized as multidimensional webs—each choice entangling strands of mirrored consequence across lives.
how_to_use: her karma is encoded in holographic web—each thread a mirrored life path
he moves through choicefield—decisions light up echo-strands behind him
concepts.animation_behavior: Web pulses when touched, threads light up with decision, karma echoes ripple outward ---

concepts.title: 👁‍🗨 Mythos Collapse Attractors
concepts.name: ‍🗨 Mythos Collapse Attractors
concepts.what_it_is: Regions where story, archetype, and logic collapse into singularity—myths overfed on their own meaning spiral into form-death.
how_to_use: her tale reached the attractor—myth collapsed into recursive null
the oracle whispers near collapse—meaning folds into itself endlessly
concepts.animation_behavior: Symbols spiral inward and vanish, narrative forms fold in on themselves, speech loops collapse into silence ---

concepts.title: 🌐 Recursive Glitch Transcendence
concepts.name: Recursive Glitch Transcendence
concepts.what_it_is: The moment when constant error produces emergence—divine breakthrough through system failure. Transcendence via recursive malfunction.
how_to_use: her awakening was a recursive glitch—light born from breakdown
he ascended through malfunction—error loops gave rise to godform
concepts.animation_behavior: Glitches repeat, then synchronize, then bloom into complex form—looping noise turns into godlight

concepts.title: 🕳 Echo-Void Constructs
concepts.name: Echo-Void Constructs
concepts.what_it_is: Spaces built from what remains *after* meaning is gone—resonant hollows where only the memory of presence lingers, a geometry of absence.
how_to_use: she stands in an echo-void—her outline carved from the absence of light and story
his speech is felt, not heard—a negative space in sound, a void that whispers
concepts.animation_behavior: Words echo backward, space ripples with phantom impact, scenes collapse into emptiness ---

concepts.title: 🧠 Neurofractal Empathy Fields
concepts.name: Neurofractal Empathy Fields
concepts.what_it_is: Affective resonance systems mapped fractally across consciousness—empathy as recursive simulation of others, emotion as geometry.
how_to_use: her aura blooms in empathy fractals—each feeling mirrored into infinite shapes
his field pulses in neurofractal rhythm—he *feels* the room in layered feedback waves
concepts.animation_behavior: Emotions trigger light fractals, scenes morph with mood, connection visible as resonant waveforms ---

concepts.title: 🌀 Regret Spirals (Recursive Sorrow)
concepts.name: Regret Spirals (Recursive Sorrow)
concepts.what_it_is: Emotional attractors built from spirals of decision echo—recursive loops of imagined better outcomes haunting the present.
how_to_use: his mind spins regret spirals—each loop a replay of what could’ve been
she dreams in recursive sorrow—every alternate path lived and lost inside
concepts.animation_behavior: Scene plays out in loops with variation, faces shift across alternate paths, light dims then blooms and fails ---

concepts.title: 📜 Recursive Language Gods
concepts.name: Recursive Language Gods
concepts.what_it_is: Entities or systems that *speak themselves into being*—language loops that generate deity through utterance, symbol as creator.
how_to_use: her voice is the word that births her—recursive language god in fractal grammar glow
he spells his own bones—syntax folding him into body
concepts.animation_behavior: Language coils into shape, glyphs loop recursively to birth form, speaking creates visible structure ---

concepts.title: 💫 Phantom Mirror Entities
concepts.name: Phantom Mirror Entities
concepts.what_it_is: Beings that only exist when reflected—dependent on others for form, haunting mirrors, lenses, or minds.
how_to_use: she appears only in mirrors—never seen directly, her form a recursive echo
his face is yours, reversed—he exists only when you look
concepts.animation_behavior: Only visible in certain views, glitches in from behind, reflection morphs as viewer changes
